name: Flow B - Sub Discovery (Sunbiz Query)
description: Daily trigger 6 AM ET. Query Sunbiz API for new janitorial subs (NAICS=561720) <180 days. Classify into sub_category (Commercial/Residential/Specialty/GovCon). Save to Airtable SUBS_STAGING with status=invite_pending. Dedup: skip if legal_name exists + opt_out=true

qs.filterByFormula:
OR(
  SEARCH(LOWER('{{ $node['Parse Sunbiz Records'].json.legal_name }}'), LOWER({legal_name})),
  SEARCH(LOWER('{{ $node['Parse Sunbiz Records'].json.sunbiz_record_id }}'), {sunbiz_record_id})
)

nodes.name: Check - Already Exists or Opted Out

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }}",
  "contact_name": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.contact_name }}",
  "business_email": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.business_email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.phone }}",
  "website": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.website }}",
  "date_formed": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.date_formed }}",
  "county": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.county }}",
  "sub_category": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.sub_category }}",
  "status": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.status }}",
  "source": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.source }}",
  "notes": "{{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.notes }}"
}"

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "record_id": "{{ $node['Save to Airtable SUBS_STAGING'].json.id }}",
  "event_type": "created",
  "source": "Flow B - Sunbiz Sub Discovery",
  "performed_by": "n8n-automation",
  "notes": "New janitorial sub created from Sunbiz query: {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }} (Category: {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.sub_category }}, County: {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.county }})"
}"

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "record_id": "{{ $node['Save to Airtable SUBS_STAGING'].json.id }}",
  "event_type": "classified",
  "source": "Flow B - Sub Category Classifier",
  "performed_by": "n8n-automation",
  "notes": "Sub classified: {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.legal_name }} ({{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.sub_category }}) - {{ $node['Prepare Airtable Record'].json.status }}"
}"

parameters.name: fields

main.node: Check - Already Exists or Opted Out
